name: Michele Pascale
title: PhD Student in Mathematics
summary: I am a PhD student in Mathematics working on theoretical aspects of spatially varying regularisers and image reconstruction methods.

intro.role: PhD student in Mathematics at Queen Mary University of London
intro.previous: Before my PhD, I completed an MPhil in Machine Learning at University College London, jointly funded by Great Ormond Street Hospital, developing super-resolution techniques for accelerated MRI.

positioning: Research interests include inverse problems, measure theory, mathematical imaging, and deep learning.
Industry experience across computer vision, data science, web scraping, public datasets, and research engineering.
I like work that joins rigorous mathematics with useful computational systems.
